name: Cloudflare, Inc.
description: Cloudflare, Inc. is a leading cloud services provider that delivers a broad range of network services to businesses worldwide. The company offers a global cloud platform that provides security, performance, and reliability for internet properties, including websites, APIs, and applications. Cloudflare's services include content delivery network (CDN) capabilities, DDoS protection, web application firewalls, and serverless computing through its Workers platform. By operating a massive global network, Cloudflare helps protect and accelerate internet traffic while reducing the complexity of managing on-premises hardware.
